acceptance_criteria: Attestation validator emits deterministic remote_enclave_attestation@1 and attestation_verification_result@1.
Current local verifier result is recomputed and exact local equivalence is required.
Evidence writer emits deterministic canonical closeout bundle with v34a, v34b, v34c, v34d, and v34e blocks.

evidence_slots.description: Runtime observability comparison row against v52 baseline.

task_scope_summary: Deterministic closeout compile for provider-neutral attestation validation baseline plus canonical v34e evidence integration.
